description: Grant ONLY the native directory-open dialog to the sidecar-served form page, which loads from a remote loopback origin. local:false scopes the grant to the remote origin so the trusted local ui/index.html is unaffected. The port is a wildcard because _pick_port falls back to an ephemeral port when 8765 is taken, and Tauri's URLPattern parser never auto-wildcards the port (an exact :8765 would silently break the picker; tauri discussion #11622, plugins-workspace #2131). dialog:allow-open only (not dialog:default, which would also grant save/message/ask/confirm); no fs:* is added because the sidecar reads disk itself.
